headline: InterDigital’s (IDCC) Amazon Licensing Deal: A Turning Point For Its IP Monetization Strategy?
summary: InterDigital recently announced a new patent license agreement with Amazon covering its services and devices, including Prime Video, while both companies agreed to resolve all pending litigation through binding arbitration to determine final terms. This deal underscores the commercial relevance of InterDigital’s wireless and video intellectual property across major streaming and device platforms, reinforcing the importance of licensing to its business model. Next, we’ll explore how resolving...

headline: The Bull Case For Old Dominion Freight Line (ODFL) Could Change Following Rising LTL Pricing Amid Amazon Threats - Learn Why
summary: In early June 2026, Old Dominion Freight Line reported that May revenue per day rose as higher less‑than‑truckload (LTL) pricing more than offset lower shipment volumes, while investors weighed inflation, rate expectations, and Amazon’s entry into LTL freight alongside insider selling and institutional repositioning. This mix of healthier yields, soft tonnage, geopolitical and energy cost pressures, and fresh competitive threats has sharpened attention on how resilient Old Dominion’s...

headline: Closed Rite Aid stores get surprising retail replacement

headline: Barclays Says Amazon’s No. 2 Position in Satellite Internet Could Still Be a Major Opportunity
summary: Amazon’s Leo satellite broadband initiative faces a number of operational hurdles in the near term, but Barclays believes the project retains substantial long-term potential, arguing that even a second-place position in the global satellite connectivity market could generate significant value. headline: Amazon Expands Satellite, Cloud And Robotics Investments As Valuation Gap Widens
summary: Amazon.com (NasdaqGS:AMZN) plans to acquire Apple’s 20% stake in satellite operator Globalstar as part of an $11.6b satellite communications agreement tied to its Project Leo plans.
